name: omp-dynamic-workflows
description: Dynamic multi-agent workflow orchestration for omp

scripts.check: bun test tests/*.test.ts && bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --external @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent --external @oh-my-pi/pi-ai --external @oh-my-pi/pi-tui --outdir /tmp/omp-dynamic-workflows-check
